simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hx
    rcases hx with ⟨N, hN, hxN⟩
    have h_le_N : x ≤ N := (hB N hN).symm ▸ le_sSup hxN
    have h_split : sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x}) ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) := by
      apply sSup_le; rintro y ⟨hy, hy_ne⟩
      simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hy; rcases hy with ⟨M, hM, hyM⟩
      by_cases h_eq : M = N
      · subst h_eq; left; exact le_sSup ⟨hyM, hy_ne⟩
      · right; exact le_sSup_of_le M ⟨hM, h_eq⟩ ((hB M hM).symm ▸ le_sSup hyM)
    have h_mod : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) := by
      refine le_trans (le_inf (le_trans ha h_le_N) (le_trans ha' h_split)) (le_of_eq ?_)
      rw [inf_comm, sup_comm, sup_inf_assoc_of_le]
      · rw [disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp (D.sSupIndep' N hN), sup_bot_eq]
      · rw [hB N hN]; exact sSup_le_sSup (Set.diff_subset _ _)
    exact hB' N hN x hxN a ha h_mod

classical
    simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hx
    rcases hx with ⟨N, hN, hx⟩
    let u := sSup (B N hN \ {x})
    let v := sSup (SetLike.coe D \ {N})
    have h_le : a ≤ u ⊔ v := by
      apply ha'.trans (sSup_le _)
      rintro y hy
      simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion] at hy
      rcases hy with ⟨⟨M, hM, hyM⟩, hyx⟩
      obtain rfl | hne := eq_or_ne M N
      · exact le_sup_of_le_left (le_sSup ⟨hyM, hyx⟩)
      · exact le_sup_of_le_right (le_trans (le_sSup hyM) ((hB M hM).trans_le (le_sSup ⟨hM, hne⟩)))
    have h_disj : Disjoint N v := D.sSupIndep hN (Set.diff_subset _ _) (Set.not_mem_diff_of_mem rfl)
    have h_u_le_N : u ≤ N := (sSup_le_sSup (Set.diff_subset _ _)).trans_eq (hB N hN).symm
    have h_a_le_u : a ≤ u := by
      refine le_of_le_of_eq (le_inf (ha.trans ((le_sSup hx).trans_eq (hB N hN))) h_le) ?_
      rw [sup_comm, ← sup_inf_assoc_of_le h_u_le_N, h_disj.eq_bot, bot_sup_eq]
    exact (hB' N hN hx).le_bot_of_le ha h_a_le_u

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hx
    rcases hx with ⟨N, hN, hxN⟩
    let Y := sSup (B N hN \ {x})
    let Z := sSup (SetLike.coe D \ {N})
    have hZ : Disjoint N Z := D.sSupIndep' N hN
    have hY : Disjoint x Y := hB' N hN x hxN
    have h_le : sSup ((⋃ M, ⋃ (hM : M ∈ D), B M hM) \ {x}) ≤ Y ⊔ Z := by
      apply sSup_le_iff.mpr
      rintro m ⟨⟨M, hM, hmM⟩, hmx⟩
      by_cases h : M = N
      · subst h
        exact le_sup_left_of_le (le_sSup ⟨hmM, hmx⟩)
      · exact le_sup_right_of_le <| (le_sSup hmM).trans <| le_sSup ⟨hM, h⟩
    have h_Y_le_N : Y ≤ N := sSup_le_iff.mpr fun _ h => (hB N hN).symm ▸ le_sSup h.1
    have h_inf : N ⊓ (Y ⊔ Z) = Y := by
      rw [sup_comm, ← sup_inf_assoc_of_le h_Y_le_N, disjoint_iff.mpr hZ, bot_sup_eq]
    have ha_le_Y : a ≤ Y := by
      rw [← h_inf]
      apply le_inf _ (ha'.trans h_le)
      rw [hB N hN] at hxN ⊢
      exact ha.trans (le_sSup hxN)
    exact le_trans (le_inf ha ha_le_Y) (disjoint_iff.mpr hY).le

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hx
    rcases hx with ⟨N, hN, hx⟩
    let Rest := ⋃ (M) (hM : M ∈ D) (_ : M ≠ N), B M hM
    have h_decomp : (⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x} ⊆ (B N hN \ {x}) ∪ Rest := by
      rintro y ⟨⟨M, hM, hy⟩, hne⟩
      by_cases h : M = N
      · subst h; left; exact ⟨hy, hne⟩
      · right; exact Set.mem_iUnion_of_mem M (Set.mem_iUnion_of_mem hM (Set.mem_iUnion_of_mem h hy))
    have hRest : sSup Rest ≤ sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) := sSup_le_iff.mpr fun y hy => by
      rcases hy with ⟨M, hM, hMN, hy⟩
      exact (hB M hM ▸ le_sSup hy).trans (le_sSup ⟨hM, hMN⟩)
    have : a ≤ (sSup Rest ⊔ sSup (B N hN \ {x})) ⊓ N :=
      le_inf (ha'.trans ((sSup_le_sSup h_decomp).trans sSup_union.le).sup_comm)
        (ha.trans (le_sSup hx |>.trans (hB N hN).symm.le))
    rw [sup_inf_assoc_of_le (hB N hN ▸ sSup_le_sSup (Set.diff_subset _ _)),
        (Disjoint.mono_right hRest (D.sSupIndep' N hN)).symm.eq_bot, sup_bot_eq] at this
    exact (hB' N hN).disjoint_sSup x hx |>.le_bot_of_le (le_inf ha this)
  sSup_eq_top' := by
    simp only [sSup_iUnion, hB]
    exact D.sSup_eq_top'
  not_bot_mem' := by
    simp only [Set.mem_iUnion]
    rintro ⟨N, hN, h⟩
    exact hB'' N hN h

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hx
    rcases hx with ⟨N, hN, hx⟩
    have h_inner : sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ≤ N := (sSup_le_sSup (Set.diff_subset _ _)).trans (hB N hN).ge
    have h_disj : N ⊓ sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) = ⊥ :=
      eq_bot_iff.mpr (D.sSupIndep' N hN _ inf_le_left inf_le_right)
    have h_le : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) := by
      refine ha'.trans (sSup_le ?_)
      rintro y ⟨⟨M, hM, hy⟩, hyx⟩; simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hy
      if h : M = N then
        subst h; left; exact le_sSup ⟨hy, hyx⟩
      else
        right; refine le_sSup_of_le ⟨hM, h⟩ ?_; rw [hB M hM]; exact le_sSup hy
    have : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) := by
      refine (le_inf (ha.trans ((le_sSup hx).trans (hB N hN).le)) h_le).trans ?_
      rw [sup_comm, ← sup_inf_assoc_of_le h_inner, inf_comm, h_disj, bot_sup_eq]
    exact hB' N hN x hx a ha this

classical
    simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hx
    rcases hx with ⟨N, hN, hx⟩
    have h_le_N : x ≤ N := (le_sSup hx).trans (hB N hN).ge
    have h_decomp : sSup ((⋃ M, ⋃ hM, B M hM) \ {x}) ≤ sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) ⊔ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) := by
      apply sSup_le
      rintro y ⟨⟨M, hM, hy⟩, hy_ne⟩
      by_cases h : M = N
      · subst h
        exact le_sup_right_of_le (le_sSup ⟨hy, hy_ne⟩)
      · exact le_sup_left_of_le <| (le_sSup hy).trans <| (hB M hM).ge.trans <| le_sSup ⟨hM, h⟩
    have h_disj : Disjoint (sSup (D.carrier \ {N})) N := (D.sSupIndep' N hN).symm
    have h_a_le : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) := by
      refine le_trans (le_inf (ha'.trans h_decomp) (ha.trans h_le_N)) ?_
      rw [sup_inf_assoc_of_le, h_disj.inf_eq, bot_sup_eq]
      rw [hB N hN]
      exact sSup_le_sSup (Set.diff_subset _ _)
    exact (hB' N hN x hx).le_bot_of_le ha h_a_le
  sSup_eq_top' := by
    rw [sSup_iUnion]
    simp only [sSup_iUnion]
    trans ⨆ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), N
    · congr! with N hN; exact (hB N hN).symm
    · rw [← sSup_eq_iSup']
      exact D.sSup_eq_top'
  not_bot_mem' := by
    simp only [Set.mem_iUnion]
    rintro ⟨N, hN, h_bot⟩
    exact hB'' N hN h_bot
